calendar.matters:
Hearing On Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Amiel Wade for Sara Tompkins the moving party.
Defendant Ryan P. Thackaberry the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of Tompkins versus Thackaberry Hearing on Punitive Damages; The Court takes this matter under submission.

Mr. Wade requests that he is allowed to retain the copy of documents that Mr. Thackaberry has submitted; Mr. Thackaberry opposes this request. The Court says it will rule on this matter at another time.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (505)
